title: How to setup and use Claude Code for FREE  (Step-by-Step Guide)
summary: A tutorial on using Claude Code with Ollama to build a local agentic AI travel application without paid APIs. The guide covers installation, LLM selection (Qwen 3.5), and full-stack application development with Python, Flask, and multiple AI agents.
